sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 36:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 36:1
items.html: The screen that was refined and rose from SAG consists of two phases: records of tastes, and records of dots. Thus, two kinds of couplings were made on it: From the coupling on the records of tastes emerged the upper MA and BON, clothing in the place of the tastes, which is from the Peh of SAG to the Tabur, and from the coupling on the records of the Nekudot of SAG emerged the lower MA and BON, clothing in the place where the Nekudot of SAG stood—from the Tabur downward. This lower MA and BON is the one called the ten Sefirot of Nekudim. (Inner Observation, Item 24)
